title: When Stars Die
author: A Cosmic Epic Across 10 Billion Years

tw1{0%{opacity:.3}50%{opacity:1}100%{opacity:.5}} @keyframes tw2{0%{opacity:.8}50%{opacity:.2}100%{opacity:1}} @keyframes fadeInUp{from{transform:translateY(22px);opacity:0}to{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}} @keyframes burstIn{from{transform:scale(.25) rotate(-5deg);opacity:0}to{transform:scale(1) rotate(0);opacity:1}} @keyframes meteorIn{from{transform:translateX(-30px);opacity:0;border-left-color:rgba(255,120,0,.9)}to{transform:translateX(0);opacity:1;border-left-color:rgba(125,211,252,.38)}} @keyframes headIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}} @keyframes quoteReveal{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(15px) scale(.97)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}} @keyframes novaGlow{0%,100%{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.7);opacity:.35}50%{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(2.3);opacity:.9}} @keyframes shockRing{0%{width:0;height:0;opacity:1;border-width:3px;border-color:rgba(255,200,100,.85)}100%{width:1100px;height:1100px;opacity:0;border-width:0}} @keyframes cosmicRing{0%{width:0;height:0;opacity:.75;border-color:rgba(125,211,252,.75)}100%{width:1400px;height:1400px;opacity:0;border-color:rgba(255,200,100,0)}} @keyframes cosmicRing2{0%{width:0;height:0;opacity:.5;border-color:rgba(255,180,50,.6)}100%{width:1400px;height:1400px;opacity:0;border-color:rgba(125,211,252,0)}} @keyframes titleFlare{0%,100%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(255,180,0,.5))}50%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 55px rgba(255,220,0,1)) drop-shadow(0 0 100px rgba(255,50,0,.5))}} @keyframes cosmicText{0%,100%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(125,211,252,.4))}50%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 26px rgba(125,211,252,1)) drop-shadow(0 0 50px rgba(255,215,0,.35))}} .slide-title{text-align:center!important;position:relative!important;overflow:hidden!important} .slide-title::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;width:380px;height:380px;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,200,0,.32) 0%,rgba(255,60,0,.14) 40%,rgba(120,0,200,.07) 65%,transparent 80%);animation:novaGlow 5s ease-in-out infinite;pointer-events:none;z-index:0} .slide-title::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;width:0;height:0;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);border-radius:50%;border:3px solid rgba(255,200,100,.75);animation:shockRing 3.5s ease-out infinite;pointer-events:none;z-index:0} .slide-title h1{font-size:3.2em!important;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffd700 0%,#ff8c00 30%,#ff4060 60%,#c026d3 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;animation:titleFlare 5s ease-in-out infinite,fadeInUp .9s ease both!important;position:relative;z-index:1} .slide-title h2{font-size:1.0em!important;color:#7dd3fc!important;font-weight:300!important;letter-spacing:.2em!important;text-transform:uppercase;animation:fadeInUp .9s ease .3s both!important;position:relative;z-index:1} .slide-title .slide-body{font-size:.56em!important;max-width:68%;text-align:center;opacity:.82;line-height:1.85;color:rgba(200,225,255,.88);border-top:1px solid rgba(125,211,252,.2);padding-top:.8em;margin:1em auto 0;animation:fadeInUp .9s ease .55s both!important;font-style:italic;position:relative;z-index:1} .slide-title .meta{font-size:.46em!important;letter-spacing:.3em!important;color:rgba(255,200,100,.65)!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;font-family:var(--mo)!important;animation:fadeInUp .9s ease .75s both!important;position:relative;z-index:1} .slide-section-break{text-align:center!important;position:relative!important;overflow:hidden!important} .slide-section-break::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;width:0;height:0;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);border-radius:50%;border:2px solid rgba(125,211,252,.65);animation:cosmicRing 4.2s ease-out infinite;pointer-events:none;z-index:0} .slide-section-break::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;width:0;height:0;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(255,180,50,.45);animation:cosmicRing2 4.2s ease-out 2s infinite;pointer-events:none;z-index:0} .slide-section-break h2{font-size:2.3em!important;letter-spacing:.07em!important;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#7dd3fc 0%,#ffffff 42%,#ffd700 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;animation:burstIn .7s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1) both,cosmicText 6s ease-in-out 1s infinite!important;position:relative;z-index:1} .slide-section-break h3{color:#7dd3fc!important;font-weight:300!important;letter-spacing:.12em!important;position:relative;z-index:1} .slide-section-break .slide-body{font-size:.6em!important;max-width:72%;text-align:center;opacity:.82;line-height:1.78;color:rgba(190,220,255,.88);border-top:1px solid rgba(125,211,252,.18);padding-top:.78em;margin:1em auto 0;font-style:italic;animation:fadeInUp .8s ease .6s both!important;position:relative;z-index:1} .slide-content{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,2,22,.8) 0%,rgba(10,0,32,.65) 100%)!important;border:1px solid rgba(125,211,252,.12)!important;box-shadow:inset 0 0 70px rgba(0,15,80,.22),0 0 2px rgba(125,211,252,.12)!important} .slide-content h2{font-size:1.32em!important;color:#ffd700!important;border-bottom:2px solid #ffd700!important;text-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(255,215,0,.45)!important;letter-spacing:.07em!important;animation:headIn .5s ease both!important;padding-bottom:.2em!important} .reveal .slides section.slide-content ul{font-size:1em} .slide-content ul li{font-size:.7em!important;margin-bottom:.3em!important;border-left:2px solid rgba(125,211,252,.38)!important;padding-left:.55em!important;animation:meteorIn .5s ease both!important;list-style:none!important} .slide-content ul li:nth-child(1){animation-delay:.08s!important} .slide-content ul li:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.18s!important} .slide-content ul li:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.28s!important} .slide-content ul li:nth-child(4){animation-delay:.38s!important} .slide-content ul li:nth-child(5){animation-delay:.48s!important} .slide-two-column{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,2,20,.75) 0%,rgba(12,0,28,.6) 100%)!important;border:1px solid rgba(125,211,252,.09)!important} .reveal .two-col-grid>div:first-child{border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,.3)!important;background:linear-gradient(150deg,rgba(255,215,0,.06) 0%,transparent 78%)!important;box-shadow:0 0 25px rgba(255,180,0,.06),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,215,0,.14)!important} .reveal .two-col-grid>div:last-child{border:1px solid rgba(125,211,252,.3)!important;background:linear-gradient(150deg,rgba(125,211,252,.06) 0%,transparent 78%)!important;box-shadow:0 0 25px rgba(100,200,255,.06),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(125,211,252,.14)!important} .reveal .two-col-grid>div:first-child .col-title{color:#ffd700!important;border-color:rgba(255,215,0,.55)!important;text-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(255,215,0,.55)!important} .reveal .two-col-grid>div:last-child .col-title{color:#7dd3fc!important;border-color:rgba(125,211,252,.55)!important;text-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(125,211,252,.55)!important} .reveal .two-col-grid .col-title{font-size:.88em!important;letter-spacing:.09em!important} .reveal .two-col-grid ul{font-size:.57em!important} .reveal .two-col-grid li{margin-bottom:.22em!important} .slide-quote{background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 38%,rgba(100,0,200,.2) 0%,transparent 62%),rgba(0,0,18,.9)!important;text-align:center!important} .slide-quote blockquote{font-size:.92em!important;font-style:italic!important;font-weight:300!important;color:rgba(240,248,255,.95)!important;border:none!important;max-width:84%!important;line-height:1.9!important;text-shadow:0 0 22px rgba(180,130,255,.16)!important;animation:quoteReveal 1.1s ease .15s both!important} .slide-quote .attribution{color:#ffd700!important;letter-spacing:.14em!important;font-size:.62em!important;font-family:var(--mo)!important;animation:fadeInUp .8s ease 1s both!important} .slide-table{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,2,20,.82) 0%,rgba(5,0,24,.7) 100%)!important} .slide-table h2{color:#ffd700!important;text-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(255,215,0,.42)!important} .reveal table{font-size:.48em!important;border-collapse:collapse!important} .reveal table th{background:rgba(255,215,0,.08)!important;color:#ffd700!important;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(255,215,0,.38)!important;letter-spacing:.07em!important;font-family:var(--mo)!important;padding:.4em .5em!important} .reveal table td{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(125,211,252,.08)!important;color:rgba(215,235,255,.9)!important;font-family:var(--mo)!important;padding:.3em .5em!important} .reveal table tr:hover td{background:rgba(125,211,252,.05)!important}

slides.title: When Stars Die
slides.subtitle: A Cosmic Epic Across 10 Billion Years
slides.body: Every atom in your body was forged inside a dying star. This is the story of how the universe's most powerful engines ignite, rage, and finally collapse — scattering the seeds of planets, oceans, and life across the cosmos.

slides.title: ⭐ Act I — Fire in the Void
slides.subtitle: How a star is born from darkness
slides.body: In vast clouds of hydrogen that dwarf solar systems, gravity wins. Gas contracts. Temperature climbs. At 10 million degrees, nuclei fuse — and a star blazes to life against the eternal dark.

slides.title: The Nuclear Furnace
bullets: ☀️ Every second the Sun fuses 620 million tonnes of hydrogen into helium
🔥 Core temperature: 15 million °C — where hydrogen nuclei violently fuse
⚖️ Radiation outward pressure vs gravity inward: the eternal balancing act
⚡ One solar flare releases more energy than all human history combined
💀 When hydrogen runs out, the balance breaks — and the star begins to die

slides.title: Two Paths to Oblivion
left: 🔴 Expands into a Red Giant, swallowing its inner planets
🌸 Outer layers drift away as a glowing Planetary Nebula
💎 Core remains as a White Dwarf — Earth-sized, Sun-mass
❄️ Slowly cools over trillions of years to near absolute zero
🌑 Black Dwarfs don't yet exist — the universe is too young
right: 🌋 Iron ash builds in the core — fusion can no longer continue
💀 Core collapses in under one second, then bounces outward
💥 Supernova: briefly outshines an entire galaxy of 100B stars
⚡ Leaves a neutron star spinning at hundreds of rotations/sec
🌌 Ejects heavy elements forged in the collapse into the galaxy

slides.title: 🔴 Act II — The Giant Awakens
slides.subtitle: When the hydrogen runs out
slides.body: After billions of years, the hydrogen runs out. Gravity wins. The core contracts, heats, and the outer shell swells to a giant. Our Sun will expand 200 times larger — swallowing Mercury, Venus, and perhaps Earth.

slides.title: Neutron Stars: Nature's Extremes
bullets: ⚡ Born when a stellar core collapses in under 0.1 seconds after supernova
🏋️ One teaspoon of neutron star material weighs 10 million tonnes
🔄 Pulsars: some spin 716 times per second, as precise as atomic clocks
🌊 Merging neutron stars create gravitational waves — first detected 2017
🥇 All gold and platinum in the universe forged in neutron star collisions

slides.title: Black Holes: Where Physics Ends
bullets: 🕳️ Stellar black holes: 5–100× the Sun's mass crushed to infinite density
🌀 The event horizon: once crossed, not even light can escape
⏱️ Time dilation: clocks near a black hole's edge run almost infinitely slow
📡 First black hole image: M87* — 6.5 billion solar masses (2019)
☢️ Hawking radiation: black holes slowly evaporate over 10⁶⁷ years

slides.quote: The nitrogen in our DNA, the calcium in our teeth, the iron in our blood, the carbon in our apple pies were made in the interiors of collapsing stars. We are made of star-stuff.

slides.title: ✨ We Are Stardust
slides.subtitle: Every atom in you was forged by a dying star
slides.body: You are not merely made of matter. You are made of stellar ash — remnants of stars that burned and died before Earth was born. The iron in your blood, the oxygen in your lungs: cosmic recycling at its most profound.
